prompt: Add water-drop distortions above each letter—tiny lenses that refract the underlying color.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, which displays colorful 3D letters. Add tiny, clear water-drop shaped distortions onto the top surface of each individual letter. These distortions should function as small lenses, refracting and subtly magnifying the underlying color and texture of the letter beneath each drop.
objects: Tiny, clear water-drop shaped distortions on letter surfaces
Refraction effect visible through water-drop distortions
Subtle magnification effect visible through water-drop distortions
